title: Fig 27
caption: dispersal: clusters do not separate (2000 MCS).
simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. interpretation: Clusters remain attached, an extreme partial-sorting case just below the separation threshold (Fig 27).
